image.title: Gordon Burgett | Director of Software Engineering, Albers Aerospace

item.title: Making a static site searchable
item.description: My site is getting pretty big now! 50+ posts, plus my journal entries from years past, I have content stretching over 4 years. So I started thinking about ways to add search functionality. And anyone who knows me knows I like to make these kind of things more complicated than they need to be, so with that in mind I had a fun challenge to solve. How do I add search functionality to a static site?
